heading: Omitted
label: 315 to 315i Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 315 to 315i, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 315, acts , ; , , authorized public school and utility districts to construct facilities, incur bonded indebtedness, and perform other defined functions.May 31, 1938, ch. 298, § 152 Stat. 589July 24, 1946, ch. 610, § 160 Stat. 659Section 315a, acts , ; , , required submission of proposal to electors before any public utility or school district could incur a bonded indebtedness.May 31, 1938, ch. 298, § 252 Stat. 589July 24, 1946, ch. 610, § 260 Stat. 659Section 315b, , , set out terms, execution, interest, and sales price of bonds of public utility or school district.act May 31, 1938, ch. 298, § 352 Stat. 589Section 315c, , , laid upon governing body of each district duty of levying taxes to provide payment of interest and principal on bonds.act May 31, 1938, ch. 298, § 452 Stat. 590Section 315d, , , repealed laws inconsistent with sections 315 to 315d and restricted effect of any limitation placed upon powers granted thereby to such powers and not to powers granted by any other sections.act May 31, 1938, ch. 298, § 552 Stat. 590Section 315e, acts , ; , , , authorized issuance of refunding bonds by municipal corporations and public utility districts.Jan. 17, 1940, ch. 3, § 154 Stat. 14Pub. L. 85–675, § 172 Stat. 625Aug. 18, 1958Section 315f, acts , ; , , , set terms, interest, negotiability, etc., of refunding bonds.Jan. 17, 1940, ch. 3, § 254 Stat. 15Pub. L. 85–675, § 172 Stat. 626Aug. 18, 1958Section 315g, acts , ; , , , laid upon governing body of municipal corporations or public-utility or school district duty of levying taxes to retire refunding bonds.Jan. 17, 1940, ch. 3, § 354 Stat. 15Pub. L. 85–675, § 172 Stat. 626Aug. 18, 1958Section 315h, , , ratified prior issues of refunding bonds.act Jan. 17, 1940, ch. 3, § 454 Stat. 15Section 315i, , , , ratified prior issues of refunding bonds.Pub. L. 85–675, § 272 Stat. 626Aug. 18, 1958
